articles.description: Arne Slot's gamble to start Alexander Isak against PSG backfires with his own future also in the balance after a Champions League exit.
articles.title: Champions League: Arne Slot's Alexander Isak gamble backfires as Liverpool's silverware hopes end

articles.description: Atletico Madrid survive a valiant Barcelona fight back to progress to the Champions League semi-finals 3-2 on aggregate despite losing a thrilling quarter-final second leg 2-1 in Madrid.
articles.title: Atletico Madrid survive Barcelona scare to reach Champions League semis

articles.description: Liverpool boss Arne Slot says Hugo Ekitike's injury 'looks really bad' after the France striker was taken off on a stretcher during Tuesday's Champions League loss to Paris St-Germain.
articles.title: Hugo Ekitike: Liverpool striker's injury 'looks really bad', says Arne Slot

articles.description: How can Sarina Wiegman get the best from one of England's most talented footballers, Lauren James?
articles.title: Lauren James: How can Sarina Wiegman and England get the best from talented forward?

articles.description: Andoni Iraola's decision to leave Bournemouth could make it a frantic summer in the Premier League's managerial market, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Will Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth departure speed up the managerial merry-go-round?

articles.description: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta wants the club to play with "pure fire" as they prepare for one of their biggest weeks in years.
articles.title: Arsenal vs Sporting: 'No fear, pure fire' - Gunners boss Mikel Arteta defiant for pivotal week

articles.description: Unified heavyweight world champion Oleksandr Usyk defended his decision to face boxing novice Rico Verhoeven next month.
articles.title: Oleksandr Usyk: Unified heavyweight world champion defends title defence vs kickboxer Rico Verhoeven

articles.description: Watch and follow live text commentary, score updates and match report from Scotland vs Belgium in the Women's World Cup qualifying.
articles.title: Scotland vs Belgium: Women's WC Qualification Europe video stream & live text

articles.description: Rhian Wilkinson says Wales must "take care of our own business" before focusing on what looks set to be a key Women's World Cup qualifier against Czech Republic in June.
articles.title: Women's World Cup qualifying: Wales to take care of own business, says Rhian Wilkinson

articles.description: Northern Ireland boss Michael McArdle praises the "intent" his side showed in his first game in charge as they eased to a 4-0 win over Malta in World Cup qualifying.
articles.title: Northern Ireland 4-0 Malta: Michael McArdle praises NI's 'intent' in big win over Malta
